testcase.name: test_employee_login
testcase.failure: tests/test_cortracker_features.py:44: in test_employee_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Employee login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Employee login failed: {"detail":"Account is deactivated. Please contact administrator."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_performance_insights_pdf_export
testcase.failure: tests/test_cortracker_features.py:130: in test_performance_insights_pdf_export assert response.status_code == 200, f"Performance PDF export failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Performance PDF export failed: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
